items.title: List of companies to add
items.description:
This list came from a Gist in #772 but to keep things tidy, I'm closing that Issue and moving it here as a checkbox list. 

Use the list below, if it isn't checked off, it may be free to add. Check the company doesn't exist in the list and then open a PR to add it. Once merged, check off the list.

items.title: [Bug]This list is compromised. It includes suspicious URLs, jobs that have nothing to do with tech, and pure advertisments.
items.description:
**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Desktop (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: [e.g. iOS]
 - Browser [e.g. chrome, safari]
 - Version [e.g. 22]

**Smartphone (please complete the following information):**
 - Device: [e.g. iPhone6]
 - OS: [e.g. iOS8.1]
 - Browser [e.g. stock browser, safari]
 - Version [e.g. 22]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.

items.title: Looking for companies to add? READ THIS!
items.description:
There are currently three open Issues that contain lists of companies to add to this project. 

#772 (via https://github.com/remoteintech/remote-jobs/issues/772#issuecomment-648824419)
#1206
#1638 

If you would like to contribute, review the [Contributing guidelines](https://github.com/remoteintech/remote-jobs/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md) and create a PR mentioning the source. Do NOT comment on each of these three Issues asking me to assign the issue or say you will add one. Please do the work and don't create more noise.
